perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair pinned back waves at the camera while holding makeup products. (2) She opens a foundation jar and uses a brush to apply it to her face. (3) She sprays a setting spray onto a makeup sponge and dabs it across her forehead and cheeks. (4) She applies loose powder using a large puff. (5) She demonstrates an eyeshadow palette, showing the numbered shades, and proceeds to apply them with different brushes. (6) She applies lipstick with a wand applicator. (7) She presents a set of colorful makeup brushes and a branded pouch to the camera. (8) She smiles and poses to show the completed makeup look.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic music begins. A female voice greets the audience with an enthusiastic and friendly tone, introducing a five-minute makeup challenge. (2) As the music continues at a consistent volume, the speaker provides a step-by-step narration, naming the specific brands and functions of the makeup products. (3) Subtle sound effects of the setting spray and the dabbing of brushes are audible. (4) The speaker's tone shifts slightly to a persuasive and sharing style as she introduces a brush set for a giveaway. (5) The music and voice fade out together as she concludes the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '5分鐘化妝' (5-minute makeup) appears as a hook at the start. (2) Functional Text: Product labels appear including 'SUQQU 粉霜', 'Nicor 定妝噴霧', '文森蜜粉', 'I’M MEME 數字眼影盤', 'FreshO2 雙頭唇釉'. (3) Decorative Text: 'LOVELYKITTEN 糖果迷妳化妝刷套組' appears during the promotional segment. (4) Functional Text: '完成' (Finished) appears at the end with a checkmark.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Makeup Step Demonstration -> Brush Set Promotion -> Final Look Reveal

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian female with dark hair tied up, wearing a cream-colored sleeveless knit sweater over a white long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor setting with clothing racks filled with various garments visible in the background, suggesting a dressing room or fashion studio.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick makeup tutorial for beginners and promote specific beauty products, including a giveaway of a makeup brush set.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration and recommendation of products with brand names displayed in text overlays.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a vertical format optimized for social media short-video platforms, focusing on relatable beauty content and viewer engagement through a giveaway.
